summary: This course focuses on English speaking and listening, while also covering grammar and vocabulary.
aims:
・To develop English communication skills, particularly in speaking and listening
・To improve English pronunciation, using authentic recorded input
・To acquire English vocabulary to converse on a range of topics
・To improve knowledge of English grammar in order to converse more fluently
・To develop cultural understanding as it relates to English language use
・To enage in autonomous language study, focusing on listening
goals: Learn about American and British culture, as related to language use
Acquire skills for autonomous language study

extra.label: 履修における注意点
extra.text: １年次に必修。１外国語（英語）履修上限年間10単位。卒業にはⅠとⅡ両方が必要。

extra.label: 資格等
extra.text: 教免－省令で定める科目：外国語コミュニケーション
